## Problem
What workflow pain or gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the desired behavior.

## Why this matters
How does this improve operator reliability, recoverability, docs clarity, release readiness, or state/model consistency?

## Alternatives considered
What else could solve it?

## Additional context
Links, examples, or prior art.
